isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric 1of1 & JIDA & LILAC - Moonlight (DIA VER)

Romanization

Bet you know
All the words to shut me up
Throw my heart out the window
I skip a breath or two for a “hey”
Everything I see, I see a little piece of you
I must be going crazy
Every moonlighted night I dream a dream of you
I’ll let you fool me into falling in love
I’ll let you break my heart anytime you want
Everything I see, I see a little piece of you
I must be going crazy
Every moonlighted night I dream a dream of you
I’ll let you paint my world with the shade you like
I’ll let you find my love from the moon and back
I’ll let you fool me into falling in love
I’ll let you break my heart anytime you want

I’ll let you paint my world with the shade you like

isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric 1of1 & LILAC - ONE DAY (DIA VER)

Romanization

A sea of stars
Where everything sparkles the way they do
Are you here to tell you mattered too
Will you lose yourself in orbit of lights
I stand in the city that forgets the yesterdays of us
I stand between the lights, forgotten by the dawn
Im looking for something to tell me I shined
In this ocean of lights
In this ocean of lights
One day I’ll sparkle in the sky
One day you’ll find me in the sky

Hangeul

I stand in the city that forgets the yesterdays of us

In this ocean of lights
In this ocean of lights

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Hong Kyung & 1of1 - Bonvoyage (Demo ver)

Romanization

jeulgeoume chwihago
mumyeongui natseon dosiro tteonado nareul dalmeun saramgwa
nae buranhan mirae
geu sai jjeum jameul jago
soneul bibyeo,geommul teumsaereul didyeo meonjideophin eolgureul ssiseonaeryeohaedo mureum kkeute
deonjyeojin maneun saram
0gwa 1 eodijjeume
seororeul bogo isseo
Woo

Hangeul

즐거움에 취하고
무명의 낯선 도시로 떠나도 나를 닮은 사람과
내 불안한 미래
그 사이 쯤 잠을 자고
손을 비벼,건물 틈새를 디뎌 먼지덮힌 얼굴을 씻어내려해도 물음 끝에
던져진 많은 사람
0과 1 어디쯤에
서로를 보고 있어
Woo
